name: policypool
description: PolicyPool Agent Coverage adds money-backed policy receipts for agent work.

scripts.typecheck: node --check api/*.js && node --check api/lib/*.js && node --check scripts/*.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/*.mjs && python3 -m py_compile scripts/policypool_fast_responder.py scripts/policypool_review_watch.py
scripts.agent:gate: npm run typecheck && npm run agent:verify && npm run agent:verify-preflight && npm run agent:verify-payout-runner && npm run agent:verify-chain && npm run agent:probe && npm run site:verify && npm run build
scripts.agent:gate-live: npm run agent:gate && npm run agent:verify-live
